steps.title: Bracket the appositive list
steps.content: The sentence already has a closing em dash before thrived. The names Rasta, Pretty Boy, and Makhulu form an interrupting appositive, so the blank needs matching punctuation to open that interruption.

steps.title: Match the closing dash
steps.content: B uses a semicolon, C uses no mark, and D uses a comma; none can pair cleanly with the later em dash. The needed mark creates a matched pair around the list. The answer is A.
